sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ حَمْزَةُ رِيشَةَ طَائِرٍ كَبِيرَةً عَلَى الشُّرْفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Hamza je pronašao veliku ptičju pericu na balkonu.
sentences.translationEn: Hamza found a large bird feather on the balcony.

sentences.translation: Perica je bila obojena plavom i zelenom bojom.
sentences.translationEn: The feather was coloured blue and green.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَرَ حَمْزَةُ مِنْ قَبْلُ طَائِرًا بِهَذَا الْلَوْنِ فِي الْحَيِّ.
sentences.translation: Hamza ranije nikada nije vidio pticu takve boje u kvartu.
sentences.translationEn: Hamza had never seen a bird of this colour in the neighbourhood before.

sentences.arabic: بَحَثَ فِي الْكُتُبِ وَوَجَدَ أَنَّهَا رِيشَةُ طَاوُوسٍ.
sentences.translation: Tražio je u knjigama i pronašao da je to paunja perica.
sentences.translationEn: He searched in books and found that it was a peacock feather.

sentences.arabic: عَرَفَ أَنَّ حَدِيقَةَ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ الْقَرِيبَةَ تَرَبِّي الطَّوَاوِيسَ.
sentences.translation: Shvatio je da obližnji zoološki vrt uzgaja pauniče.
sentences.translationEn: He learned that the nearby zoo kept peacocks.
